title: localization — declared entitlements
description: Three entitlement keys. Locale count is a slot (concurrent limit). AI translations are a pool (per-month quota). Auto-translate is a boolean gate.

entitlements.description: How many WorkspaceLocale rows a workspace can have enabled. Enterprise = unlimited.
Per-month AI translation quota. One TranslateJob invocation = 1 unit regardless of source-text length. Excess above cap is refused when auto_translate=true.
Gate on auto-translate feature availability. Independent of the monthly quota — free plan has 0 quota AND boolean=false.
How long Translation rows persist in the cache before PruneStaleTranslationsJob purges (source='ai' rows only).
